companion.admin_note: Admin only. Each code mints a new token, shown once. Manage or revoke under Settings → API tokens.
companion.pair_description: Generate a one-time pairing code (a chat-scoped API token) for a LAN client.
companion.pairing_qr_unavailable: QR rendering unavailable — enter the details manually.
companion.pairing_warning: Shown once. This grants chat access to your Ulises; revoke it in Settings → API tokens (id {token_id}). The device must be on the same network, and the server must bind to your LAN.
